mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge_order (patient_id, operator_id, total_amount, pay_type, status) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{operatorId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payType}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT co.*, p.name as patient_name FROM charge_order co LEFT JOIN patient p ON co.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE co.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE charge_order SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
